---
title: "runtimes"
author: "damigonzalez"
date: "2025-12-29"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

raw <- read_excel("runtimes_rfhap.xlsx")
raw$...3 =NULL
raw$...6 = NULL
raw

```


```{r cars}
library(gt)


gt_tbl <- gt(raw) |>
  fmt_missing(
    columns = everything(),   # o un vector de nombres/posiciones de columnas concretas
    missing_text = ""         # cadena vacía para que no se muestre nada
  ) |>
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Computational resource usage**"),
    subtitle = "RFHap vs Hifiasm Trio"
  ) |>
  opt_all_caps(FALSE) |>
  opt_table_outline() |>
  opt_vertical_padding(scale = 1.1) |>
  tab_options(
    table.font.color = "black",
    table.font.size = px(10),
    heading.title.font.size = px(14),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(11)
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    `...4` = "",
    `...7` = "",
    `...9` = ""
  )

gt_tbl



```
```{r}
library(gt)
library(dplyr)

gt_tbl <- raw %>%
  # quitar filas totalmente vacías antes de gt
  filter(!if_all(everything(), ~ is.na(.) | trimws(as.character(.)) == "")) %>%

  gt() %>%
  fmt_missing(
    columns = everything(),
    missing_text = ""
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Computational resource usage**"),
    subtitle = "RFHap vs Hifiasm Trio"
  ) %>%
  opt_table_font(font = list("Arial")) %>%   # opcional según tu versión de gt
  tab_options(
    table.font.color = "black",
    table.font.size = px(9),
    heading.title.font.size = px(11),
    heading.subtitle.font.size = px(9),
    column_labels.font.size = px(9),
    data_row.padding = px(3),
    table.border.top.width = px(1),
    table.border.bottom.width = px(1),
    table.border.left.width = px(0),
    table.border.right.width = px(0),
    heading.border.bottom.width = px(1),
    column_labels.border.bottom.width = px(1)
  ) %>%
  opt_all_caps(FALSE) %>%
  cols_label(
    `...4` = "\u00A0",
    `...7` = "\u00A0",
    `...9` = "\u00A0"
  )

gt_tbl


```
